issues.description: Action type is 'Rest' but the card text says 'cannot attack during this turn' — this is a restriction/debuff, not a Rest action. Should use 'GiveKeyword' with keyword 'CannotAttack' or similar restriction mechanism.

Target scope is wrong. Text says 'Select up to 1 of your opponent's Characters' — target should be the opponent's Character, not 'this' card. Scope should be 'OpponentCharacter' or 'ChooseOpponentCharacter', maxCost constraint is correct but action is fundamentally wrong.
Duration missing. Text specifies 'during this turn' — must include duration:'DuringOpponentTurn' to indicate the restriction lasts only until end of opponent's turn.
